---
title: "Contact"
description: >-
  Get in touch with Natalia Gumińska: email, GitHub, ORCID, Google Scholar,
  LinkedIn, and institutional address.
toc: false
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
Happy to talk about RNA tailing, nanopore sequencing, research software, figure
work, or possible collaborations. Email is the most reliable way to reach me.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid reveal">

  <a class="contact-card" href="mailto:nguminska@iimcb.gov.pl">
    <i class="ci bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">Email</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">nguminska@iimcb.gov.pl</span></span>
  </a>

  <a class="contact-card" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4599-2897" rel="me">
    <i class="ci bi bi-person-badge"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">ORCID</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">0000-0002-4599-2897</span></span>
  </a>

  <a class="contact-card" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Xx8ApXAAAAAJ&hl=en">
    <i class="ci bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">Google Scholar</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">Publications and citations</span></span>
  </a>

  <a class="contact-card" href="https://github.com/nemitheasura" rel="me">
    <i class="ci bi bi-github"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">GitHub</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">nemitheasura</span></span>
  </a>

  <a class="contact-card" href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB">
    <i class="ci bi bi-people-fill"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">GitHub, laboratory</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">LRB-IIMCB</span></span>
  </a>

  <a class="contact-card" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/natalia-gumi%C5%84ska-49b162115/" rel="me">
    <i class="ci bi bi-linkedin"></i>
    <span><span class="c-label">LinkedIn</span><br>
    <span class="c-value">Natalia Gumińska</span></span>
  </a>

</div>
```

::: {.highlight-box .reveal}
**Where I am.** Laboratory of RNA Biology (ERA Chairs Group), International
Institute of Molecular and Cell Biology, ul. Ks. Trojdena 4, 02-109 Warsaw,
Poland.
:::

::: {.reveal}
### What to expect

Email gets a reply within a few working days. For software questions, an issue
on the relevant repository is better than email, because it is searchable and
helps the next person with the same problem. For anything involving data, please
say which kit and basecaller version produced it, since that is the first thing
I will ask.
:::
